review_text: Oh wow, absolutely INCREDIBLE battery life on the PowerDrive Pro. Lasts a whopping 45 minutes! Amazing! And the build quality is just chef's kiss — plastic that creaks every time you touch it. Totally worth the $200 price tag. 10/10 would not recommend.

scoring_notes.notes: Hard case: sarcasm. stars_inferred may be 1 or 2. Document as known weakness if model scores 3+
